clinical_criteria: Height/Weight measurement available for same day (only actual measured, not stated or estimated)
Age in days at measurement: > 365 days and < 2190 days for cases
Age in days at measurement: > 1460 and < 2920 for controls
Multiple BMI measurements >= 99th percentile for cases
More than 50% of BMI measurements > 76th percentile for cases
All BMI measurements >= 5th percentile and <= 85th percentile for controls
All BMI measurements <= 15th percentile for Control 2 classification
BMI calculated using WHO criteria for ages 366-729 days
BMI calculated using greater of WHO or CDC for ages 730-1859 days
BMI calculated using CDC criteria for ages 1860-2920 days
Continuous steroid therapy > 2 weeks OR > 3 separate courses totaling over 28 total days in last 6 months excludes cases
algorithm_summary: This phenotype algorithm identifies severe early childhood obesity cases and controls in children aged 1-6 years. Cases require multiple BMI measurements with >= 99th percentile readings and >50% of measurements >76th percentile. Controls require BMI measurements between 5th-85th percentiles in children aged 4-8 years. The algorithm uses age-appropriate BMI calculations (WHO for younger children, CDC for older) and excludes children with genetic syndromes, endocrine disorders, malignancies, transplants, malabsorption syndromes, and those on chronic steroids or certain medications that could affect weight.
